config.handybookshelf.title: Handy Bookshelf Settings
config.handybookshelf.enableGlint.desc: Show an enchantment shimmer on chiseled bookshelf slots that contain enchanted books.
config.handybookshelf.enableNameTags.des: Show a floating label above bookshelf slots when you aim at them. Displays enchantment names, written book titles, and custom item names.
config.handybookshelf.nameTagRange.desc: How close you need to be (in blocks) for name tags to appear.
config.handybookshelf.nameTagScale.desc: Size of the name tag text. 100% is vanilla name tag size.
